# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app
Own a piece of sacred ground where Jesus walked. Rocks of Galilee crafts authentic Holy Land gifts from real Sea of Galilee stones — order yours today.

### Pieces
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/pieces
Explore sculpted angel wings and holy hands cradling real Galilee stones. Unique baptism gifts from Israel, handmade near Bethlehem — shop our full collection now.

### Story
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/story
Discover how Israel-based artisans near Bethlehem gather sacred stones and pour devotion into every piece — a mission to bring the Holy Land to believers worldwide.

### Contact
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/contact
Have a question or want to gift someone a sacred piece of Israel? Reach out to Rocks of Galilee and let us help you find the perfect Religious home decor Christian treasure.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
